name: Simply Chicken/Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and cut the chicken into pieces, if using whole birds.
2. Chop celery, carrots, and onion into large chunks.
3. Place the chopped vegetables at the bottom of the crockpot (they will be discarded after cooking).
4. Add the chicken to the pot on top of the vegetables.
5. Cook on low for 6-8 hours.
6. Remove the cooked chicken and serve.
